name: Chocolate Chip Lollipops
recipeIngredient: 1 package DUNCAN HINES Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine the cookie mix, buttery flavor packet from the Mix, egg, and water in a large bowl. Stir until thoroughly blended. Shape dough into 24 balls (about 1 inch each). Place the balls about 3 inches apart on ungreased baking sheets. Push an ice cream stick into the center of each ball. Flatten each ball with your hand to form a round lollipop.
3. Decorate by pressing decorations onto the dough.
4. Bake at 375°F for 8-9 minutes, or until lightly golden brown. Cool for 1 minute on the baking sheets. Remove to cooling racks and allow to cool completely. Store in an airtight container.
Makes 2 dozen cookies.
Tip: For best results, use shiny baking sheets when baking cookies. Dark baking sheets can cause the cookie bottoms to become too brown.
